Home → Discography → The Mantra

The Mantra

2020 · Self-released

Produced entirely by Blais, this solo statement is widely seen as one of his stronger later-career releases. True to his traditional melodic, uptempo style, it creates what sounds like a missing entry in the larger Bone Thugs-N-Harmony discography, while also making a noticeable effort to weave in something more contemporary. A purely self-contained project with Bizzy as sole executive producer.

"I ain't no motherfuckin model, I don't walk the runway neither, Imma pull out pistol, after pistol, Until the police see em."

— Shot Gun
